landing.heroDescription: Kola ebifaananyi by'okusoma ebirungi, ebibiino, emirimu, empapula z'okukola n'ebifo by'evidiyo mu sikonda. Leka AI ekole omulimu omuzito olyoke obeere n'ekisinga obukulu - abayizi bo.
landing.featuresTitle: Byonna By'weetaaga Okukola Ebirimu Ebirungi Ennyo

contentTypes.imageDesc: Kola ebifaananyi ebirungi, ebisigade mu kibiina ebikola ebirowoozo bifuuke eby'amaanyi
contentTypes.presentationDesc: Kola ebibiino ebiramba n'ebifaananyi n'ebiwandiiko by'omwogezi mu budde butono
contentTypes.textDesc: Kola engero, ebinnyonnyola n'ebikozesebwa mu kusoma ebyenkanaankana n'omutindo gwonna
contentTypes.activityDesc: Tegeka ebibuuzo eby'okukwatagana, emizannyo gy'okugatta n'emirimu gy'ekibiina esanyusa
contentTypes.storyboardDesc: Tegekeraho evidiyo ez'okusoma ez'okuvuga n'emikutu gy'okulaba ekifaananyi ku kifaananyi
contentTypes.worksheetDesc: Kola empapula z'okukola ezisobiika n'ebibuuzo, ojjuzeewo ebifo n'ebirala

auth.loginSubtitle: Yingira okwongera okukola ebirimu ebirungi ennyo
auth.signupSubtitle: Tandika okukola ebirimu by'okusoma mu sikonda

footer.description: Ekifo ky'okukola ebirimu ekikozesebwa AI ky'abasomesa abalina emirimu emingi. Kola ebifaananyi by'okusoma, ebibiino, emirimu, empapula z'okukola n'ebifo by'evidiyo mu sikonda.
